provenance.prompt: oil painting, semi-realistic painterly prop concept art, muted dusty palette, subtle dark edges, soft directional lighting, worn and functional sci-fi signage and interface design, visible surface texture and aging, visible brushstrokes, centered on plain dark grey background, sleek modern flat UI design with bright blue gradients and clean white text, Material Design aesthetic, crisp pixel-perfect elements, looks like a smartphone app mockup, contemporary not sci-fi

judgment.explanation: Flat Material Design UI mockup. Contemporary smartphone aesthetic, not sci-fi, not painterly.
